summary: First iteration. Backend FastAPI mirror is solid (17/17 pytest tests passing). Frontend home page renders correctly with hero, campaign banner, marquee, stats, About, social icons; referrer chip works with ?ref=. Admin login flow works (wrong pw rejected, correct pw logs in); all 7 admin tabs and their data-testids are present and wired. Claims table Credit/Reject buttons work end-to-end (verified pending → credited flip on row #1). On-chain tab fetches live BSC RPC data (chain_id=56, block_number, marketing wallet BNB balance). However, the Credit tab 'Record credit' button is NOT wired — no API call happens on click.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Record credit' submit button is missing onClick={submit}. The submit() handler is defined but never invoked, so clicking the button does nothing (no API call, no toast, no list refresh). The Credit form is also NOT wrapped in a <form onSubmit={submit}>, unlike the login form, so there is no fallback path either. Verified via UI (form filled, button clicked, GET /api/admin/credits?address=0x9999… returned total=0).

integration_issues.issue: Submitting the Manual credit form does not POST to /api/admin/credit because the button has no onClick handler.

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/components/Admin.jsx CreditTab: add onClick={submit} to the Record credit button (line ~212), OR wrap the inputs+button in a <form onSubmit={(e)=>{e.preventDefault();submit();}}> so Enter / button click submits. Recommend the onClick fix for parity with the other tabs (Content/Campaign/Social all use onClick={save}).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.jsx CreditTab 'Record credit' button is dead — onClick missing (other Save buttons in Content/Campaign/Social all have onClick={save}, this one was just forgotten).
server.py is 567 lines — borderline acceptable but consider splitting admin routes vs public routes for maintainability if it grows.
Backend correctly excludes Mongo _id from responses (uses _seq as numeric id).
_normalize_social() in backend correctly auto-prepends https:// — verified end-to-end (admin posts 'facebook.com/hc', GET /api/config returns 'https://facebook.com/hc', footer links use the URL).
Frontend axios interceptor only injects Bearer token for paths starting with /admin — correct.
Campaign banner appeared in homepage immediately after admin enabled it — config is fetched on each home load.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (1 broken submit button on Admin Credit tab)

test_credentials: Admin password: humanity-admin-2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and prompt). Verified working.
seed_data_creation: Tests created several wallets/claims/credits via API and via UI Credit (#2 row credited via UI). Campaign + Social settings set during tests were reverted to empty at end so the home page no longer shows a campaign banner / social URLs unless re-enabled by admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_humanity_coin.py (17 tests, pytest parallel safe — each test uses a unique address derived from time). The only outstanding fix is wiring the CreditTab button. Re-test: open /admin, login with humanity-admin-2026, go to Credit tab, fill address/amount, click 'Record credit' — should see toast 'Credit recorded' and a new row in the Credit history table. The PHP deliverable in /app/dist/humanity-coin/ was NOT tested in preview (FastAPI is the live preview backend).
rca of the issue: RCA: In /app/frontend/src/components/Admin.jsx line 212, the Record credit <button> has data-testid and disabled props but no onClick. The submit() async function (line 192-201) which calls api.adminCredit({...}) is never bound. Other Save buttons in the same file (lines 295/326/360) correctly use onClick={save}. Reproduction: /admin → login → Credit tab → fill fields → click Record credit → nothing happens. Mitigation: change line 212 to <button data-testid={TID.adminCreditSubmit} disabled={busy || !form.address || !form.amount} onClick={submit} className="hc-btn w-full">. One-line fix.
